ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Farine de ble 27%, eau, levain de seigle (farine de seigle, eau, sel), raisins secs 7%, seigle entier, graines de lin brun 5%, graines de tournesol 5%, epeautre (ble), sucre, flocons d'avoine, graines de courge 2%, graines de sesame 1%, noisettes 1%, sel, levure.
